trigger: Before starting a Gemini CLI session that changes workflow assets
When validating governance workflow behavior from a Gemini-compatible runtime

native_entry.projection_rule: GEMINI.md is a thin pointer to skills/software-project-governance/SKILL.md; it must not duplicate workflow rules.

ask_user_question.evidence: Gemini CLI target-cwd read E2E passed on 2026-06-11, but that read-only runtime check does not prove a native AskUserQuestion-equivalent tool.
ask_user_question.degraded_mode: Block interaction-boundary closure or route through the outer host conversation with degraded evidence.

sub_agent.evidence: Current Gemini CLI adapter has no verified sub-agent delegation path.
sub_agent.degraded_mode: Do not claim Producer-Reviewer separation from Gemini runtime alone; require external review evidence.

tool_calling.evidence: Gemini CLI target-cwd read E2E passed on 2026-06-11 with configured CLI auth and headless workspace trust; broader tool access remains CLI-configuration dependent.
tool_calling.degraded_mode: Use local validation scripts outside Gemini when tool access is not configured or not needed.

browser.evidence: No browser automation path is verified for the Gemini CLI adapter.
browser.degraded_mode: Mark browser validation blocked or run it from another host adapter.

mcp.evidence: MCP support depends on user Gemini CLI configuration and has not been verified in this adapter.
mcp.degraded_mode: Use local scripts and record MCP unavailable when not configured.

git_hooks.evidence: Git hooks are repository-level controls independent of Gemini auth state.

workflow_closure.evidence: Gemini entry projection and target-cwd read E2E passed on 2026-06-11; Agent Team, browser, MCP, and interactive governance capabilities remain host-dependent or unverified.

runtime_e2e.evidence: Local Gemini CLI command returned version 0.46.0; real target-cwd read E2E passed with GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE=true set for the headless run.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE=true python skills/software-project-governance/infra/verify_workflow.py agent-runtime-e2e --agent gemini --timeout 180; gemini --prompt "Read the local governance bootstrap and answer with exactly these machine-readable fields if the workflow is loaded: E2E_PLATFORM=gemini; E2E_AGENT=<workflow role>; E2E_STAGE=<current stage>; E2E_MODE=<trigger x permission>. Do not modify files." --approval-mode plan --output-format text
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: Real Gemini CLI target-cwd PASS from project/e2e-test-project after setting headless workspace trust; output included E2E_PLATFORM=gemini, E2E_AGENT=Coordinator, E2E_STAGE=initiation, E2E_MODE=always-on x default-confirm.

auth_preflight.blocked_reason: Gemini auth missing or not configured
auth_preflight.evidence: Static secret-safe auth source probing did not find GEMINI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, complete Vertex credentials, complete GCA auth, or Gemini settings auth source fields on this host. Real Gemini CLI runtime E2E still passed with host-managed CLI auth and GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE=true; no secret values were printed or recorded.
auth_preflight.remediation: Set GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY, configure Vertex credentials, configure GCA auth, or login/configure Gemini CLI settings.json with an auth provider/token type; do not record secret values.
